description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a sleek, low-cut design with a predominantly dark gray mesh upper and vibrant red-orange accents on the collar, heel, and sole. The shoe displays a large, light gray Nike Swoosh logo on the side, and the word 'AIRMAX' is visible on the midsole, indicating an air-cushioned sole unit. The lacing system is standard with flat gray laces, and the tongue is padded for comfort, bearing a visible Nike label. The midsole is thick and appears to be constructed from a lightweight, shock-absorbing foam, while the outsole is designed for traction and durability. The interior is lined with a soft, red-orange material for added comfort. This shoe is suitable for urban environments, offering both style and functionality for walking or running.
description: A stylish, low-cut Nike athletic shoe with a dark gray mesh upper, red-orange accents, and a visible air-cushioned sole, designed for comfort and performance.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the red-orange heel collar, visible air unit in the midsole, and large Nike Swoosh on the side.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the rounded heel, red-orange collar, and the transition between the dark upper and bright sole.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the lacing system, padded tongue with Nike label, and the sleek, aerodynamic shape.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the toe box, laces, and the overall streamlined silhouette of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Large light gray Nike Swoosh on the side; Nike label on the tongue in white on black background.
